sequence-1-8_file1.desc:
Thanks for watching!

Warning: THERE ARE A LOT OF VIDEO GLITCHES!!!

Advice: Just let the file play in real-time. It’s about ten hours long!

If you like any of the shows here, please consider buying the actual DVDs, VHS tapes, LaserDiscs, digital downloads, or streaming subscriptions to support the creators.

It took over three days to encode this, and blame Handbrake for the video glitches, not Lightworks, not iMovie, not Panasonic. Handbrake. There wasn't any other way to get this digitized.

Be grateful that this was even recorded at all by me. Apparently on a tape that has UPN’s Disney’s One Too, so an older, more rare children’s block was taped over just so I could watch Toonami and Cartoon Network later. (Ah, the old, awful way of constantly reusing video tapes.) Also, please don’t ask, nor make requests, for programming. Anything I upload is from my own personal collection of recordings. If I upload somebody else’s stuff, it won’t be branded with our watermark. If you want to help, consider, please, becoming a monthly patron at our Patreon: patreon.com/coffee4binky and please, enjoy the video.

autumnal_sleeps_file1.desc: Autumnal Sleeps is a 2019 Irish surrealist avant-garde film directed by Michael Higgins. Produced by the Arts Council of Ireland in association with the Experimental Film Society, the film was photographed on expired 35mm film with a fifty-year-old Soviet camera.
